US.name: United States
US.default_policy: Use only locally verified editions in published-editions.json.

CA.name: Canada
CA.default_policy: Confirm that an edition is lawful for use in Canada before downloading or redistributing it.

GB.name: United Kingdom
GB.default_policy: Confirm the particular edition contains no protected additions before downloading or redistributing it.

MX.name: Mexico
MX.default_policy: Confirm the applicable Mexican term and the edition's rights before downloading or redistributing it.

US.note: Renewal registration R641953; no local U.S. mirror before 2045 without permission.

CA.note: The source identifies the work as Canadian public domain and directs users outside Canada to check their own law.

GB.term_basis: Known-author literary works generally run for 70 years after the author's death; Orwell died in 1950.
GB.note: Use a source and edition cleared for UK distribution; do not assume a Canadian host's terms apply in the UK.

MX.term_basis: Mexico's general term is the author's life plus 100 years.
MX.note: Do not add a local mirror without a specific Mexican rights review or permission.
